svg.text: ESP32 LED Controller v6 — Electrical Schematic
Conventional symbol view; net names and AHCT125N pin numbers are the source of truth.
Critical: U1 pins 10 and 13 are /OE3 and /OE4. Tie them to +5V_LOGIC to disable unused channels.
from ESP32 USB/VIN only — do not backfeed
Unused AHCT125 channels — disabled, inputs defined
• +12V_PROTECTED and +5V_LOGIC must be open/megaohms before power. • ESP32 is USB-powered only; never backfeed VIN from 12V supply.
• Full LED current stays off solderless breadboard. Breadboard may carry logic/data/common-reference ground only, unless tiny current-limited LED load.
• D1 1N5822 drawing is for the current-limited prototype path; final multi-amp protection needs a properly rated reverse-protection block.
